sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109409" key="u(potriplasiepidi/pemptos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποτριπλᾰσι-επιδίπεμπτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n109409.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">contained</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg014:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope> </bibl> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg014:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope> </bibl>/<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg014:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg014:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17</biblScope> </bibl>/<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg014:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope> </bibl>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">times,</tr_> Domnin. in Boisson.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Anecd.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.420</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
